zh.lifeSummary: 當Alix 'Alicia Alice' De Montfort Comtesse Sur-Risle於1050年出生時，她的父親Hugh de Monfort II30歲，母親Alice Beaufour18歲。她於1065年之前與Gilbert de Gant在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾福爾金哈姆結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1094年在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾福爾金哈姆享年44歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾巴德尼。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alix 'Alicia Alice' De Montfort Comtesse Sur-Risle于1050年出生时，她的父亲Hugh de Monfort II30岁，母亲Alice Beaufour18岁。她于1065年之前与Gilbert de Gant在英国英格兰林可爾史爾福爾金哈姆结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1094年在英国英格兰林可爾史爾福爾金哈姆享年44岁，埋葬在英国英格兰林可爾史爾巴德尼。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Montfort
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French and Breton: variant of   Monfort   1. This surname is most common in Brittany and Haute-Savoie. See also 2 below.
Altered form of Dutch Montfoort: habitational name from Montfoort in Utrecht. It is a cognate of 1 above (see Monfort 1) and also its altered form (or perhaps vice versa).
English (of Norman origin): very rare variant of   Mountford  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Monfort
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Jacques, Marcel, Monique, Wilner.

French and Breton: habitational name from any of numerous places called Montfort, from Old French mont ‘hill’ (see Mont 1) + fort ‘strong, impregnable’ (from Latin fortis). This surname is by far most common in Brittany. It is also found in Haiti. Compare Montfort 1, see also 2 below.
Altered form of Dutch Montfoort, a variant of Montfort 2 and also a cognate of the French name in 1 above and an altered form of its variant Montfort 1 (or perhaps vice versa).

variants.name: Monforte
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Salvatore, Carmela, Carmine, Rocco, Rosaria, Sal.  Spanish Carlos, Francisco, Luis, Medardo.

Italian and Spanish: habitational name from any of numerous places called Monforte, from Latin mons ‘mountain’ (genitive montis) + fortis ‘strong’, probably a reference to the strategic position of these locations.
English (of Norman origin): variant of   Montfort  . This form of the surname is rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Alix
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Alex  , used only as a feminine name. Its formation has probably been influenced by   Alice .

nameMeanings.name: 'Alicia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Modern Latinate form of   Alice .  It was borne by the British ballerina  Alicia Markova  (born  Lilian Alicia Marks ,  1910–2004 ).

variants.name: Alisha
meanings: Modern Latinate form of   Alice .  It was borne by the British ballerina  Alicia Markova  (born  Lilian Alicia Marks ,  1910–2004 ).

variants.name: Alisia
meanings: Modern Latinate form of   Alice .  It was borne by the British ballerina  Alicia Markova  (born  Lilian Alicia Marks ,  1910–2004 ).

variants.name: Alyssa
meanings: Variant spelling of   Alissa .

variants.name: Alissa
meanings: Contracted form of   Alicia .

variants.name: Alesha
meanings: Respelling of   Alicia .

nameMeanings.name: Alice'
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

variants.name: Alys
meanings: Variant spelling of   Alice .

variants.name: Alis
meanings: equivalent of Alice .

en.lifeSummary: When Alix 'Alicia Alice' De Montfort Comtesse Sur-Risle was born in 1050, her father, Hugh de Monfort II, was 30 and her mother, Alice Beaufour, was 18. She married Gilbert de Gant before 1065, in Folkingham, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1094, in Folkingham, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 44, and was buried in Bardney, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alix 'Alicia Alice' De Montfort Comtesse Sur-Risle est née en 1050, son père, Hugh de Monfort II, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Alice Beaufour, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé Gilbert de Gant avant 1065, à Folkingham, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1094, à Folkingham, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 44 ans, et a été enterrée à Bardney, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alix 'Alicia Alice' De Montfort Comtesse Sur-Risle 1050 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hugh de Monfort II 30 und ihre Mutter Alice Beaufour 18. Sie hat vor 1065 in Folkingham, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom Gilbert de Gant geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1094 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Folkingham, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Bardney, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alix 'Alicia Alice' De Montfort Comtesse Sur-Risle è nata il nel 1050, sua padre, Hugh de Monfort II, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Alice Beaufour, aveva 18 anni. Lei sposato Gilbert de Gant prima del 1065, nel Folkingham, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1094, nel Folkingham, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 44 anni, e fu sepolta a Bardney, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Alix 'Alicia Alice' De Montfort Comtesse Sur-Risleが1050年に生まれた時，父Hugh de Monfort IIは30歳，母Alice Beaufourは18歳であった。1065年以前にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアフォルキンガムでGilbert de Gantと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1094年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアフォルキンガムで44歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアバードニーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alix 'Alicia Alice' De Montfort Comtesse Sur-Risle(이)가 1050년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugh de Monfort II(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Beaufour(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1065년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 폴킨그함에서 Gilbert de Gant(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1094년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 폴킨그함에서 44세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 바드니에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alix 'Alicia Alice' De Montfort Comtesse Sur-Risle nasceu em 1050, seu pai, Hugh de Monfort II, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Alice Beaufour, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com Gilbert de Gant antes 1065, em Folkingham, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1094, em Folkingham, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 44 anos, e foi sepultada em Bardney, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alix 'Alicia Alice' De Montfort Comtesse Sur-Risle родилась в 1050 г., её отцу по имени Hugh de Monfort II было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Beaufour, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Gilbert de Gant перед 1065 г. в местности фолкингхам, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1094 г. в местности фолкингхам, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 44 лет и была похоронена в местности бардни, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alix 'Alicia Alice' De Montfort Comtesse Sur-Risle nació en 1050, su papá, Hugh de Monfort II, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Alice Beaufour, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Gilbert de Gant antes de 1065, en Folkingham, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1094, en Folkingham, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 44 años, y fue sepultada en Bardney, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
